gist.headline: The daily buzz
gist.blurb: Our automated scribe just pinned the latest community updates to the hive's bulletin board.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README and social media pipeline files.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community apps and news.
gist.visual_concept: The monitor robot and Polly the bee updating a community bulletin board with fresh news clippings.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a fresh newspaper to a wooden bulletin board. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny pencil. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
